вҖҺвҖ§вӮҠЛҡвң§ Short Description вң§ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§

Public opinion had never held weight for Knox Devlin, whether in the cold, rigid halls of his childhood home or within the carefully ordered world of the House of Thorns. As long as he remained in control, the noise of others never mattered.

He was raised in wealth, judgment, and expectation, with every relative and onlooker certain they knew the shape his life should take. They demanded an heir to carry on the Devlin legacy, not a man who carved his own.

But Knox had no interest in boardrooms or the endless accumulation of fortune. What he craved was structure, rules, and a world free of the shallow criticism that came with indulgence.

He built that world in his club. The House of Thorns is his masterpiece, a place where control and freedom coexist, and it would not be whole without youвҖ”his favorite submissive, his chosen partner in bondage, pain, and care.

Tonight, with the lounge crowded by both veterans and newcomers, his eyes had been on you as often as his whiskey. And he was glad for that, because when a smug, self-proclaimed Dom stepped into your space and began speaking down to you, Knox was already watching.
